name: Jacob Lawrence
description: An informational resource for the artist Jacob Lawrence, built on WordPress with a custom photo gallery plugin. This project was a rewarding deep dive into the lives of the artists, tying in Lawrence's art with the content to make the site feel like an art piece itself. A collaboration with Montana Banana.

name: Progress Virginia Education Fund
description: A nonprofit based in Virginia. Built on WordPress within a 3-day turnaround due to a tight timeline.

name: Advocate Accounting
description: Revamped website focused on modernizing the design and improving accessibility. Includes an integrated shopping cart and training portal powered by Stripe.

name: Progress Alliance Technical Security Assessment
description: Conducted a comprehensive technical security assessment for Progress Alliance. This included stakeholder interviews, penetration testing, and a detailed report with actionable remediation steps.

name: WCA Data Hub Portal
description: A custom-built data hub for Washington Community Alliance partners to submit support requests. Uses WordPress for user registration and membership management, backed by a custom MySQL database system and Google Drive integrations.

name: Sit N Stay
description: A full-service petcare company in Burien, Washington. Features creative hover events over the navigation, paw-print call-to-action elements, and a responsive color mosaic on the services page. A collaboration with Montana Banana.
